Proof-settlement at scale

Many work receipts.
One settlement
boundary.

Run a local MandateEpoch: a sponsor mandate becomes bounded microjobs, proof receipts, quarantine roots, payout roots, archive deltas, AGIJobManager checkpoint posture, and Chronicle memory. The demo never touches a wallet, network, token route, or user data.

Run the clearinghouseOpen Upgrade Foundry

No user data wanted. No account. No form. No cookies. No analytics. No storage. No wallet. No network request. No transaction broadcast. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed phrase, private-key, or proprietary information.

LOCAL SIMULATION · HUMAN REVIEW · ZERO EXTERNAL ACTIONS

01

Compose the mandate

This is a local demonstration of the clearing logic. It does not submit, store, transmit, approve, trade, or settle anything.
02

Clearinghouse state

WAITING_FOR_MANDATEepoch: —
accepted receipts—
quarantined—
disputed—
α-WU cleared—
03

Public roots

The public proof layer sees roots, signatures, attestations, summaries, and boundaries. Private traces, customer data, prompts, and sensitive tool output remain outside the public page.

04

MandateEpoch receipt

Run the clearinghouse to generate a MandateEpochReceipt.
01One mandate

A single AGIJobManager-compatible epoch represents a bounded body of work.

02Many receipts

NettingHouse-style batches summarize microjobs without putting every step on-chain.

03Challenge window

Disputes, quarantine, and validator reveals block weak receipts before settlement.

04Chronicle memory

Only accepted receipts become durable institutional memory and reusable capability.
